name: SegmentedControl
visual_summary: SegmentedControl is a segmented control UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: SegmentedControl
Description: SegmentedControl is a segmented control UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: shadow, themeable, utility-styled
Interactions: animated, interactive
Tags: control, mantine, other, segmented

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
